hero.title: FinanceTask
hero.headline: Manage your finances simply and efficiently.
hero.description: FinanceTask organizes your income, expenses and financial tasks in one place. Track your balance in real time, view monthly history and receive smart suggestions to improve your financial health.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need
features.description: Simple tools for powerful financial control.

register.title: Record instantly
register.description: Add income and expenses quickly, without hassle.

deadlines.title: Never miss a deadline
deadlines.description: Organize financial tasks by month and stay on top of everything.

history.title: Complete history
history.description: View income, expenses and balance month by month with clarity.

insights.title: Smart insights
insights.description: Receive automatic recommendations based on your financial profile.

alerts.title: Automatic alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when your spending exceeds what was planned for the month.

sync.title: Real-time sync
sync.description: Your data always up to date on any device, without reloading.

stats.title: Numbers that speak for themselves
stats.subtitle: Simple, fast and free from day one.

ana.name: Ana Lima
ana.text: I can finally see where my money goes every month. Simple and very fast to use.

carlos.name: Carlos Mendes
carlos.text: The automatic insights helped me cut expenses I didn't even know I had. Highly recommended.

juliana.name: Juliana Costa
juliana.text: I use it every month to close accounts. The interface is clean and never crashes. Perfect.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join those who already use FinanceTask to organize their finances.

benefits.1: Record income and expenses in seconds
benefits.3: Smart recommendations based on your profile

register.prompt: Record your finances easily and quickly.
